action.reasoning: Observation: The standard PPO model achieved 0.54 success rate. Environments requiring memory and complex interactions (LockedRoom, UnlockPickup, MultiRoom) failed. Analysis: The agent lacks memory of past observations and its own inventory (carrying status is not in the default egocentric image). Decision: I will implement frame stacking (k=3) to provide short-term memory and explicitly add the agent's 'carrying' status to the observation space. I will also increase the training timesteps for the harder environments to 4M and use a higher entropy coefficient (0.05) to encourage exploration.
